subscriptions.title: Subscription

home.title: A clear timeline for every patient, from the first visit to the last.
home.description: Cradlen helps clinics organize appointments, staff, patient records, and daily follow-up in one calm workflow.
home.sameStory: Everyone works on the same story.
home.workflow: One system. Multiple roles. One clear workflow.

profile.title: Profile

account.title: Account
account.description: Email and password tied to your sign-in.
account.passwordHint: Changing your password signs you out of every device.

organization.title: Organization
organization.description: Review the current clinic organization and manage its details.
organization.editDrawerDescription: Update the organization details that identify this clinic.
organization.deleteDescription: This will soft-delete the organization, all of its branches, all staff profiles, and sign you out. This cannot be undone from the app.
organization.updateError: Failed to update organization. Please try again.
organization.deleteError: Failed to delete organization. Please try again.
organization.deleteForbidden: Only the organization owner can delete the organization.

branches.title: Branches
branches.description: Review the active branch and prepare another clinic location.
branches.drawerDescription: Add another clinic location under the current organization. Staff are not assigned automatically — assign them after creation.
branches.editDrawerDescription: Update the address and main-branch status for this branch.
branches.deleteDescription: This branch will be disabled and no longer accessible.
branches.deleteMainDescription: This is the main branch. "{name}" will be promoted to main automatically.
branches.deleteLastDescription: This is your last branch. Deleting it will soft-delete the entire organization, all staff, and sign you out.
branches.demoteWarning: Saving with this branch as main will demote "{name}".
branches.onlyMainHint: This is your only main branch. Promote another branch first if you want to demote it.
branches.cannotDemoteOnlyMain: At least one branch must remain main. Promote a different branch first.
branches.createError: Failed to create branch. Please try again.
branches.updateError: Failed to update branch. Please try again.
branches.deleteError: Failed to delete branch. Please try again.
branches.deleteForbidden: You don't have permission to delete branches. Only the organization owner can do this.

danger.title: Danger Zone
danger.description: Sensitive organization actions stay behind confirmation.
danger.deleteDescription: Soft-deletes the organization, all branches, and all staff profiles. You will be signed out and cannot recover this from the app.

empty.profileDescription: This account does not have an owner or doctor profile attached yet.

empty.branchDescription: Create a branch once branch setup is connected.

subscription.organizationLimitReached: You've reached your plan's organization limit ({current}/{limit}). Upgrade your subscription to add more organizations.
